title: oxalis caprina var. anthelmintica
intro: Oxalis caprina var. anthelmintica, also known as the anthelmintic wood sorrel, is a plant species within the Oxalis genus, characterized by its unique ability to repel and kill intestinal worms. The medicinal properties of Oxalis caprina var. anthelmintica lie in its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating digestive issues and infections. The health benefits of this plant include the prevention and treatment of parasitic infections, such as hookworms and tapeworms, as well as the alleviation of symptoms associated with these conditions, such as abdominal pain and diarrhea. Oxalis caprina var. anthelmintica can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for internal use, and is also used as a natural remedy in some traditional medicine practices.
